hero.name: Dr. V. Subburaj
hero.description: Dr. V. Subburaj is a Professor, Researcher, and Entrepreneur with 20+ years of experience in academics and technology. Founder of ISRD and CEO of Shreetech, collaborating with international clients from USA, France, Germany, Singapore, Malaysia and New Zealand.

about.title: Who I Am
bio: I am a Professor, Researcher, Entrepreneur, and Innovator based in Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India. I hold a Ph.D in Digital Image Processing from Manonmanium Sundaranar University, Tirunelveli (2016), along with M.E. (CSE), M.Phil (Computer), MCA with Distinction, and B.Sc Computer Science — all from reputed universities in Tamil Nadu.

I am the Founder of ISRD (Integrated Society for Research and Development) and CEO of Shreetech, a 7-year-old R&D firm in Madurai. I have published 12 international journal papers, filed 50+ patents, authored 4 books, and have direct international clients from USA, France, Germany, Singapore, Malaysia and New Zealand.I am a Professor, Researcher, Entrepreneur, and Innovator based in Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India. I hold a Ph.D in Digital Image Processing from Manonmanium Sundaranar University, Tirunelveli (2016), along with M.E. I have published 12 international journal papers, filed 50+ patents, authored 4 books, and have direct international clients from USA, France, Germany, Singapore, Malaysia and New Zealand.

education.title: Master of Philosophy in Computer Science

research.intro: My research spans Digital Image Processing, MANET (Mobile Ad-hoc Networks), Cryptography, Network Security, Data Mining, and IoT. I completed my M.Phil research on 'Spatial Database for Web Application' and my Ph.D in Digital Image Processing at Manonmanium Sundaranar University (2016). Through Shreetech and ISRD, I have filed 50+ patents and continue to lead cutting-edge R&D projects.
